_comment: Competitive wall-clock ratio of valgebra to pydantic-core per shape, a coarse tripwire (the deterministic cachegrind budget in perf_budget.json is the hard gate). Tolerance tightened from 0.5 to 0.35 so a regression past ~1.35x of a recorded ratio trips it; the ratio cancels the runner's absolute speed, but shared-runner noise keeps it coarser than the instruction-count gate. Provisional pending observed CI variance. Re-record after an intentional change.
